title: Canção do Exílio: nineteenth-century reception

origin.title: Canção do Exílio
origin.note: Gonçalves Dias; composed in Coimbra 1843, published in Niterói 1846; encoded in pcgd.xml. Referenced as the anchor, not re-encoded.

source: Joshua Alma Enslen, Song of Exile: A Cultural History of Brazil's Most Popular Poem, 1846-2018. Appendix ('Table of 500 Texts', catalogue rows 2-89 are this corpus) gives a String-Similarity coefficient + Positive/Negative/Other mode per poem — attached as the Stage 1 validation set (poem.enslen / context.validation).
idPolicy: cdex-p### poems (textid order), cdex-a### authors (persid order); work layer dropped; anchored to origin work00385.
titlePolicy: printed in-file <head> = title; Enslen/filename title = altTitle (present only when it differs beyond accent/case).
notPipeline: Standalone case-study bundle. NOT ingested into RPPA; no named graphs. contexts.json is a proto-context scaffold for the Stage 1 harness to fill.
